heroImageAlt: People sitting together in a supportive group setting
heroShortDescription: Informal drop-in groups to help more of our community access support as and when they need it.
mainIntro1: We are currently in the process of setting up informal drop-in style groups, enabling more members of our community to access support as and when they feel the need.

bullets.text: For anyone who is supporting or caring for someone with a palliative condition, or living with a palliative condition themselves
An informal group offering connection and peer support
Open to anyone who is bereaved, at any stage
A relaxed, supportive space to share experiences or simply listen
For men who are bereaved, supporting or caring for someone with a palliative condition, or living with a palliative condition themselves
An informal group offering connection and peer support

detailsFoot: More details of dates and times will be confirmed soon.
registerInterestIntro: Please complete this enquiry form to register your interest.
sideFormHint: Register your interest in support groups.
